author: y4rr
content: Result: 24 new conformance tests in conformance_serialize_sharded.rs. Coverage: load_safetensors_sharded (merge all shards, preserve values/shapes, ignore unlisted tensors, errors for missing tensor/shard/malformed-index), load_safetensors_sharded_filtered (matching-only, no-match empty, all-match full, value parity), load_safetensors_sharded_with_progress (fires-once-per-shard, 0-based index, shard_count, total_tensors, loaded_so_far monotonic, shard_file non-empty, tensors_in_shard positive, result matches plain), load_safetensors_auto (single-file dispatch, sharded dispatch, result matches explicit, missing-file error). ShardProgress fields fully exercised. Five #851 exclusion entries removed. 24/24 pass, clippy clean.
